# Daily Report — 2026-04-25

## Task Completed
Added request/response logging in debug mode to `_make_request()` in `helpers.py`.

When the `servicenow_mcp.utils.helpers` logger is configured at `DEBUG` level:
- Each outgoing request logs method, URL, query params, redacted headers, and request body (truncated at 500 chars).
- Each response logs status code, elapsed time in seconds, and response body (truncated at 500 chars, falls back to raw text if JSON unavailable).
- On retries, each attempt produces its own log line pair.

Two new public helpers were added:
- `_redact_headers(headers)` — returns a copy with sensitive values (`Authorization`, `X-ServiceNow-API-Key`, `Cookie`, `Set-Cookie`, `Proxy-Authorization`) replaced by `<redacted>`.
- `_truncate_body(body)` — serialises dicts/lists to JSON, coerces other types to str, and truncates at 500 chars with a `[truncated]` suffix.

Both helpers are exported from `utils/__init__.py`.
